stemHtml: As long as an aeroplane is in a steady climb…

options.a: V<sub>X</sub> is always less than V<sub>Y</sub>.
options.b: V<sub>X</sub> is always greater than V<sub>Y</sub>.
options.c: V<sub>X</sub> may be greater or less than V<sub>Y</sub> depending on altitude.
options.d: V<sub>Y</sub> is always greater than V<sub>MO</sub>.
